allow: PowerShell(cd D:\\app\\newsite; git ls-files --cached "app/services/__pycache__/" | ForEach-Object { git rm --cached "$_" --quiet }; echo "Done")

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://tiripo-ai.site/ -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object StatusCode; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://tiripo-ai.site/sitemap.xml -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object StatusCode)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/news" -UseBasicParsing; $body = $r.Content; $idx = $body.IndexOf\('home-carousel'\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { $body.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$idx-50\), 400\) } else { "home-carousel NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell(cd D:\\app\\newsite; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/ai" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $body = $r.Content; $found = $body -match 'ai-consult-history'; "status: $\($r.StatusCode\)  history section found: $found" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/ai" -UseBasicParsing; $body = $r.Content; $idx = $body.IndexOf\('ai-memo-section'\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { "memo section found at $idx" }; $idx2 = $body.IndexOf\('past_consult'\); if \($idx2 -ge 0\) { "past_consult found" } else { "past_consult NOT found" }; $idx3 = $body.IndexOf\('LINE'\); if \($idx3 -ge 0\) { $body.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$idx3-300\), 350\) })

PowerShell(cd D:\\app\\newsite; git show cc2d88c -- app/routers/news.py | Select-String -Pattern "^\\+" | Where-Object { $_ -match "persona_consult|past_consult|featured_items|latest_consult" } | Out-String)
PowerShell(cd D:\\app\\newsite; git show cc2d88c -- app/routers/news.py | Select-String -Pattern "^\\+" | Where-Object { $_ -match "persona_detail|persona_consult" } | Out-String)
PowerShell(python -c "import fastapi; import uvicorn; import jinja2; print\('FastAPI version:', fastapi.__version__\)")

PowerShell($urls = @\("http://localhost:8001/","http://localhost:8001/news","http://localhost:8001/personas","http://localhost:8001/ai","http://localhost:8001/saved","http://localhost:8001/search","http://localhost:8001/about"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "{0} → {1} \({2} bytes\)" -f $u, $r.StatusCode, $r.RawContentLength } catch { "{0} → ERROR: {1}" -f $u, $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8001/saved" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if \($r.Content -match "ニュース一覧を見る"\) { "saved empty state CTA: OK" } else { "saved CTA: MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match "site-toast-region"\) { "base layout: OK" } else { "base layout: MISSING" })

PowerShell(python -c "from jinja2 import Environment, FileSystemLoader; env = Environment\(loader=FileSystemLoader\('D:/app/newsite/app/templates'\)\); [env.get_template\(t\) for t in ['base.html','papers.html','index.html','article.html','personas.html','persona_detail.html','ai.html','search.html','saved.html','about.html','trend.html','consultation.html','authors.html','policy.html']]; print\('templates: OK'\)")

PowerShell(python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('data/explanations.db'\); cur=c.cursor\(\); cur.execute\(chr\(34\)+\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"+chr\(34\)\); print\(cur.fetchall\(\)\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app/routers/news.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\)"; echo OK)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8001/news" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \("STATUS:" + $r.StatusCode\); $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "picsum|/static/og/card-" | Select-Object -First 10 } catch { Write-Output \("ERR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8001/news" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \("STATUS:" + $r.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })
